title: Senior Teacher - Arihant Publications - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Arihant Publications - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Arihant Publications invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Teacher at our Kanpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Arihant Publications:
Arihant Publications is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Arihant Publications!
